calendar.matters:
For Settlement Of First Trust Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for and with Shirley Brotherton. Sonia Deshmukh for Sharon Apsinwall. Sandra Brotherton in Propria Persona.

The Court allowed Counsel time to review the documents that were filed on March 2, 2009 and March 6, 2009 by Sandra Brotherton. The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court approved the First Accounting Petition, signing the order for the same. The Court denied the Petition For Removal of Trustee filed by Sandra Brotherton without prejudice.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, For Appt. Of Successor Trustee And For Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Denied

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, For Appt. Of Successor Trustee And For Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-21-2009 Continued To Mar-10-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sandra Brotherton in Propria Persona. Franchesca Callejo for Shirlee Brotherton. Sonia Desmukh for Sharon Aspinwall (Respondent).

The status hearing on mediation was taken off calendar. The Petition For Removal of Trustee and For Appointment of Successor Trustee was continued to March 10, 2009 to be heard on the same date of the Trustee's accounting.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

PETITION TO TRANSFER TO ORANGE COUNTY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2008 Denied

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, For Appt. Of Successor Trustee And For Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-04-2008 Continued To Jan-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sonia Deshmukh for Sharon Aspinwall. G. Franchesca Callejo for Shirlee Brotherton. Sandra Brotherton also appeared in propria persona.

The matter of venue was presented and argued. Ms. Callejo presented a brief history of the matter and expressed her concerns as set forth on the record. The Court ordered that the accounting be filed on or before December 23, 2008. The Change of Venue was denied without prejudice, and the Court stated that once it had more information it may reconsider. In addition, the Court ordered the matter to Pro Bono Mediation which is to be completed by January 14, 2009. Status on the Mediation is set for January 21, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. Ms. Callejo is to prepare the order and circulate it to counsel.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, For Appt. Of Successor Trustee And For Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Continued To Nov-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, For Appt. Of Successor Trustee And For Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Continued To Sep-30-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for and with Shirley Brotherton (Beneficiary). Sandra Brotherton in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that there was a problem with notice as all parties were not noticed and that there was no proof of service as to Sharon. Ms. Callejo stated that she had attempted communication with Mr. Lieberman, but that he sent no correspondence, requested access to the Examiner's notes and stated that she would perform service on Sharon. The matter was continued to September 30, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR#7782. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
